CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
